name: Frog Eye Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix together the sugar, flour, and salt.
2. Gradually add 1 3/4 cups of reserved juice to the mixture and bring it to a boil.
3. Once boiling, beat the eggs well.
4. Slowly add the beaten eggs to the boiling mixture while stirring constantly.
5. Continue cooking for 1-2 minutes at reduced heat until thickened.
6. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
7. In a separate bowl, mix together the cooled pineapple juice and cooked pasta.
8. Refrigerate for 3-4 hours.
9. Add marshmallows, mandarin oranges, crushed pineapple, and Cool Whip to the pasta mixture.
10. Mix well and chill before serving.
